name: Summoning arms a spellbook (auto-equip)
description: Clicking SUMMON adds a Lv1 book (auto-equipped into an empty slot). Cost arithmetic is engine unit-test territory; idle combat income changes gold in real time, so gold values are not part of this test.

planSteps.description: Navigate to the game with the URL path /?fresh=1 (this starts a brand-new save) and wait for the game HUD showing GOLD to load
Verify the inventory strip shows the text 'INVENTORY — empty' (fresh save has no books)
Verify a book with a Lv1 badge appeared in one of the six equip slots (summons auto-equip into empty slots)
Click the SUMMON button once more
Verify two books with Lv1 badges are now visible in the equip slots (the page contains two 'Lv1' badges)
